news.title:
HDFC Bank saw an NSE block trade of ~256,388 shares at Rs. 773.
The total trade value amounted to approximately Rs. 19.82 crore.
news.summary:

news.title:
FPIs sold ₹1.18L crore in Indian equities in March 2026, with ₹60.7K crore from financial services.
Nifty Bank dropped 17%, HDFC Bank fell 17.6% amid FPI outflows; capital goods saw ₹3.1K crore inflows.
news.summary:
FPIs sold ₹1.18L crore in Indian equities in March 2026, with ₹60.7K crore from financial services.
Nifty Bank dropped 17%, HDFC Bank fell 17.6% amid FPI outflows; capital goods saw ₹3.1K crore inflows.

news.title:
Q4FY26 results: TCS, Infosys, HDFC Bank, Reliance to reveal demand, margins, and sector outlooks.
Key focuses include IT deal wins, banking credit growth, FMCG pricing, and metals' global dynamics.
news.summary:
Q4FY26 results: TCS, Infosys, HDFC Bank, Reliance to reveal demand, margins, and sector outlooks.

news.title:
BofA maintains 'Buy' on HDFC Bank with reduced target price of ₹950, citing attractive valuations and strong fundamentals.
Highlights resilient growth outlook, potential NIM upside, normalized loan growth, and healthy EPS despite macro changes.
news.summary:

news.title:

Analysts suggest valuations are now attractive for long-term investors.

news.title:

news.title:
Ambit Capital warns Iran conflict may cap credit growth at 10-12% by FY27, impacting margins and asset quality.
Private banks like HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank are better positioned due to stronger fundamentals.

Ambit Capital warns Iran conflict may cap credit growth at 10-12% by FY27, impacting margins and asset quality.

news.title:
ICICI Securities prefers large private banks like HDFC, Kotak, Axis, citing strong balance sheets and attractive risk-reward ratios.
RBL, Bandhan, City Union, Karur Vysya, DCB, South Indian Bank rated 'Buy'; SME vulnerability and geopolitical risks monitored.

news.title:
HDFC Bank analysts retain 'buy' ratings with a target of ₹1,200, implying up to 60% upside.
HDFC Bank to revise Regalia Gold, Diners Privilege card benefits, linking perks to spends from May-July.

news.title:
Bank stocks mixed; PSU banks like BoB & BoM rose sharply, private banks like IndusInd & HDFC fell.
RBL Bank showed exceptional growth in advances & deposits; IDFC First Bank faced CASA ratio decline.

news.title:
HDFC Bank's Q4 growth surpassed expectations, showcasing strong performance.
Kotak's loan growth in Q4 fell below expectations, underperforming.

news.title:
HDFC Bank reported robust deposit growth, while RBL Bank and AUSFB showed strong performance.
Credit growth is projected at 13-14% this year, with a 14% CAGR over two years.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank reported robust deposit growth, while RBL Bank and AUSFB showed strong performance.
Credit growth is projected at 13-14% this year, with a 14% CAGR over two years.

news.title:
Macquarie maintains Outperform on HDFC Bank, sets TP at ₹1,200 citing 14.4% YoY deposit growth.
HDFC Bank's LDR falls below 95%, with growth 200–300 bps ahead of system, easing investor concerns.

news.title:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.
news.summary:
Nifty Bank rebounded over 1,600 points last Thursday, ending above 51,000. Watch closely as 12 constituents reported Q4 updates.
HDFC Bank saw 12% loan growth; Axis Bank's loans grew 18.3%; IDFC First Bank posted 20% growth; IndusInd Bank saw an 8.7% decline.
